iot.topicrule.assetpropertyvariant.CfnAb: Contains an asset property value (of a single type).

iot.topicrule.assetpropertyvariant.Boole.Description: Optional. A string that contains the boolean value (`true` or `false`) of the value entry. Accepts substitution templates.

iot.topicrule.assetpropertyvariant.Doubl.Description: Optional. A string that contains the double value of the value entry. Accepts substitution templates.

iot.topicrule.assetpropertyvariant.Integ.Description: Optional. A string that contains the integer value of the value entry. Accepts substitution templates.

iot.topicrule.assetpropertyvariant.Strin.Description: Optional. The string value of the value entry. Accepts substitution templates.
